signals.headline: WisdomTree and Grayscale Spot XRP ETF Filings Clear SEC Final Review | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
WisdomTree and Grayscale Spot XRP ETF Filings Clear SEC Final Review | YES | HIGH confidence**

WisdomTree and Grayscale have confirmed their spot XRP ETF filings cleared the final SEC review stage ahead of Q2 2026 decision, joining 21Shares, Franklin Templeton, Bitwise, and Canary in the pending approval queue.[7]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41.64M Weekly, Largest in Three Months | YES | HIGH confidence**

U.S. spot XRP ETFs recorded **$41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16**, the largest single-week inflow in three months, representing a 254% jump from the prior week's $11.75 million.[1] This marks a significant shift in market conviction, with cumulative inflows reaching $1.26 billion an

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Approaching Late April 2026 | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Approaching Late April 2026 | YES | MEDIUM confidence**

The upcoming CLARITY Act markup in late April 2026 aims to provide permanent regulatory status for digital assets.[2] Analysts have characterized April as a "binary month" for XRP, with potential for rapid repricing depending on regulatory developments.[6]
